items.title: Log record flow: logger → handler(s) → formatter → destination
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR Code["logger.info('top-k retrieved', extra={...})"] --> Logger["Logger 'ragapp.retrieval'"] Logger -- inherits from --> Root["Root logger"] Logger --> Filter{"Filters?"} Filter -- pass --> H1["Console handler
(stderr)"] Filter -- pass --> H2["File handler
(rolling file)"] Filter -- pass --> H3["Sentry / Datadog handler"] H1 --> F1["Formatter
(plain text)"] H2 --> F2["Formatter
(JSON)"] H3 --> F3["Vendor-specific"] F1 --> O1[/"stderr"/] F2 --> O2[/"app.log"/] F3 --> O3[/"Sentry API"/]
items.caption: Loggers fire records; each handler may filter, format and route to a different destination — independently configured.

items.title: Severity ladder
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  D["DEBUG — full trace; usually off in prod"]
  I["INFO — normal milestones"]
  W["WARNING — recoverable surprise"]
  E["ERROR — operation failed, system continues"]
  C["CRITICAL — system / subsystem dying"]
  D --> I --> W --> E --> C
items.caption: Pick the level deliberately — wrong level either drowns in noise or hides during incidents.
